more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Abortion Clause Deleted From Medical Services Amendment Bill
more.description: Source: Abortion Clause Deleted From Medical Services Amendment Bill ⋆ Pindula News Traditional leaders in the Senate have rejected a clause in the Medical Services Amendment Bill that would have made abortion available “on demand”. The Bill had passed through the National Assembly, but the Senate turned it down after traditional leaders said they could [...]The post Abortion Clause Deleted From Medical Services Amendment Bill appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation.

more.title: Pumula residents demand probe into school fees beneficiary list
more.description: Source: Pumula residents demand probe into school fees beneficiary list — CITEZW Ward 17 residents in Pumula are demanding transparency in the payment of school fees for vulnerable children in their community. more.title: Residents protest $580 ‘illegal settler’ penalty in Umzingwane
more.description: Source: Residents protest $580 ‘illegal settler’ penalty in Umzingwane — CITEZW Residents in parts of Umzingwane district have raised concerns after being asked to pay a US$580 penalty by the local council following a data collection exercise that classified them as “illegal settlers”. more.title: Foreign Investor Duped Of US$1.5 Million In Mining Deal
more.description: The Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) have confirmed the arrest of a foreign national over alleged criminal activities in the country, although police did not disclose the nationality of either the suspect or the alleged victim.

more.title: Mangondo appointed village health workers patron
more.description: Source: Mangondo appointed village health workers patron -Newsday Zimbabwe ZANU PF Murewa South legislator and former diplomat Noah Mangondo has been appointed patron of the Zimbabwe Village Health Workers Association (ZVHWA). Mangondo took over the reins at a colourful event held in Macheke at the weekend. He takes over from cleric Zakeo Chirume, who led [...]The post Mangondo appointed village health workers patron appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation.

more.title: Kadoma seeks blueprint for clean city with Geo Pomona visit

more.title: Zimbabwe’s RioZim coal unit loses operating license after appeal
more.description: Bloomberg RioZim Ltd., a former unit of Rio Tinto Group, lost its operating license in Zimbabwe after the miner failed to develop a 2,800 megawatt coal-fired power plant. The government cancelled the license for the Sengwa coal mine under its “use-it-or-lose-it” policy after a failed appeal, Secretary of Mines Pfungwa Kunaka wrote in a letter [...]The post Zimbabwe’s RioZim coal unit loses operating license after appeal appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com.

more.title: Lack of border fences between SA and Zim compounding Foot & Mouth spread: Steenhuisen
more.description: SABC News Lack of a border fence between South Africa and Zimbabwe and broken redline fences are compounding the spread of foot and mouth disease (FMD), in Limpopo, SA Agriculture Minister John Steenhuisen has said. Steenhuisen led South Africa’s fourth nationwide mass vaccination roll-out campaign against the foot and mouth disease, in Polokwane. The campaign [...]The post Lack of border fences between SA and Zim compounding Foot & Mouth spread: Steenhuisen appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com.
